conditional: Besiktas needs to convince Nübel in upcoming talks.
headline: Besiktas Pursue Nübel Amidst Player's Ongoing Assessment
body: Besiktas continues to pursue Alexander Nübel as their top target, though the player has not yet committed to the move and is evaluating other options.
text:
🚨🦇 Besiktas are not giving up on Alexander Nübel. He remains their top target, as excl. revealed.

However, Nübel has not yet informed FC Bayern that he wants to join Besiktas. He is still assessing other options and enquiries. 

Besiktas remain in the race and continue to push. New talks are scheduled soon. It remains to be seen whether Besiktas can convince Nübel. @berger_pj @SkySportDE 🇩🇪
draft_caption:
